title: Cheetah 1.0 – Amethyst Proxy Browser SPA

requirements.text: Create a single-page React application named 'Cheetah 1.0' with a persistent amethyst/purple high-tech theme: deep purples (#6C3483), violets (#9B59B6), and magenta (#8E44AD) gradients; glassmorphism panels with backdrop blur; neon glow effects on interactive elements; animated gradient backgrounds; and a sleek monospace font. Display 'Cheetah 1.0' prominently in the header alongside a cheetah icon/logo. Dark mode is the default and only mode.

quotes: Amethyst theme: deep purples, violets, and magenta gradients
High-tech futuristic aesthetic with glowing effects, neon borders
App name "Cheetah 1.0" prominently displayed with a cheetah logo/icon

acceptanceCriteria: Header shows 'Cheetah 1.0' text and cheetah icon at all times
Background uses animated amethyst gradient (purple → deep violet → magenta)
UI panels use glassmorphism (frosted glass, backdrop-filter: blur)
Interactive elements (buttons, tabs, links) have neon glow on hover/focus
Monospace font applied to navigation and code-related elements
Dark mode is default with no light-mode toggle required

requirements.text: Implement a sidebar (or top navigation bar) with five navigation destinations: Home/Search, Games, AI Assistant, Code Editor, and Quick Open. Navigating between them updates the main content area without a page reload. Include smooth transitions between pages.

quotes: Sidebar or top navigation with these pages

acceptanceCriteria: All five nav items are visible and reachable
Active page is visually highlighted in the nav
Switching pages does not cause a full reload
Transition animation plays when switching pages

requirements.text: Implement a persistent tab bar above the main content area that supports multiple open iframe tabs simultaneously. Each tab shows the page title, favicon, and a close (×) button. A '+' new-tab button is always visible. Tabs maintain independent iframe state. Support keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+T (new tab), Ctrl+W (close active tab), Ctrl+L (focus address bar).

quotes: Tab system: multiple tabs can be open simultaneously
Tab bar shows open tabs with titles, favicons, close buttons
Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+T for new tab
Ctrl+W to close current tab
Ctrl+L to focus address bar

acceptanceCriteria: Multiple tabs can be open at the same time
Each tab shows title, favicon placeholder, and close button
Clicking a tab switches the visible iframe
Ctrl+T opens a new blank tab
Ctrl+W closes the currently active tab
Ctrl+L focuses the address bar input

requirements.text: Build the Home/Search page. Include: (1) An address bar that accepts full URLs; (2) A Google Custom Search Engine (CSE ID: 464f1cf85006c4770) search bar; (3) Back, Forward, and Refresh navigation buttons for the active iframe; (4) When a URL is entered or a search result is clicked, load the target URL inside an iframe tab using the allorigins.win CORS proxy (`https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=<encoded-url>`) as the iframe src; (5) A loading spinner while the iframe loads; (6) An error message with a direct link fallback when the site cannot be embedded.

quotes: Google Custom Search Engine (ID: 464f1cf85006c4770) integrated
Address bar to directly enter URLs
use allorigins.win or a similar CORS proxy API
https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=
error handling when sites can't be loaded in iframe (show a message with a direct link)

acceptanceCriteria: Address bar accepts and navigates to typed URLs on Enter
Google CSE search widget is rendered and functional using CSE ID 464f1cf85006c4770
Clicking a search result opens the URL in a new iframe tab via the allorigins proxy
Back, Forward, Refresh buttons control the active iframe where applicable
A spinner is shown while the iframe is loading
If the iframe fails to load, a user-friendly error message with a direct link is shown

requirements.text: Build the Games page. Display the following unblocked school game sites as clickable cards in a responsive grid, each with a thumbnail/icon, site name, and brief description. Clicking a card opens the site in a new proxy iframe tab: Math Playground (mathplayground.com), Cool Math Games (coolmathgames.com), Hooda Math (hoodamath.com), ABCya (abcya.com), Funbrain (funbrain.com), PBS Kids Games (pbskids.org/games), Typing Club (typingclub.com), Scratch (scratch.mit.edu), Khan Academy (khanacademy.org), Prodigy Game (prodigygame.com).

quotes: Unblocked school game sites displayed as cards with thumbnails/icons
When a game site card is clicked, open it in a new iframe tab in the proxy tab system

acceptanceCriteria: All 10 game site cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows an icon/thumbnail, site name, and short description
Clicking a card opens the corresponding URL in a new proxy iframe tab
Cards have neon/glow hover effects consistent with the amethyst theme

requirements.text: Build the AI Assistant (Homework Helper) page. Include: (1) A heading 'AI Homework Helper'; (2) A subject selector dropdown (Math, Science, English, History, Computer Science, Other); (3) A large textarea for the question; (4) A 'Get Answer' button; (5) A response area that renders the AI answer with basic markdown-like formatting (bold, code blocks, lists); (6) A loading spinner while awaiting the response; (7) A 'Copy Answer' button; (8) A scrollable history list of recent question/answer pairs. Use the Puter.js API via `window.puter.ai.chat` — include the Puter.js CDN script tag in the page.

quotes: Use the Puter.js AI API (window.puter.ai.chat) for AI responses - include the Puter.js script
Subject selector: Math, Science, English, History, Computer Science, Other
History of recent questions/answers
"Copy Answer" button

acceptanceCriteria: Puter.js script is loaded via CDN script tag
Subject selector has all 6 options
Submitting a question calls window.puter.ai.chat and displays the response
A spinner is shown while the request is in flight
Response area renders basic markdown (bold, inline code, lists)
'Copy Answer' copies the response text to clipboard
Recent Q&A pairs are shown in a scrollable history section

requirements.text: Build the Code Editor page with three internal sub-tabs: 'Code Editor', 'Presentation Builder', and 'Website Builder'. (1) Code Editor sub-tab: embed CodeMirror (CDN), language selector (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python), a Run/Execute button, a live preview panel for HTML/CSS/JS output, and localStorage persistence for editor content. (2) Presentation Builder sub-tab: add/delete slides each with a title, body text, and background color picker; prev/next navigation; a fullscreen 'Present' mode. (3) Website Builder sub-tab: simple component-based builder allowing users to add text blocks, image placeholders, button components, and headers; a live preview panel; note displayed: 'Public sharing only available through the Cheetah proxy'.

quotes: Three tabs within this page: "Code Editor", "Presentation Builder", "Website Builder"
Monaco Editor or CodeMirror embedded
Live preview panel for HTML/CSS/JS
Save to local storage
Add slides, edit slide content
Present mode (fullscreen)
Drag-and-drop or simple component-based website builder

acceptanceCriteria: Three sub-tabs are visible and switchable within the Code Editor page
CodeMirror is loaded via CDN and supports HTML, CSS, JS, Python syntax highlighting
Run button executes HTML/CSS/JS and renders output in a preview iframe/panel
Code editor content is saved to and restored from localStorage
Presentation builder allows adding, editing (title/body/bg color), and deleting slides
Presentation prev/next navigation works; Present mode goes fullscreen
Website builder allows adding text, image placeholder, button, and header components
Website builder shows a live preview of the composed page
Website builder displays the 'Public sharing' note

requirements.text: Build the Quick Open page. Display the following six sites as large, visually distinct cards in a grid, each with a big icon, site name, and brief description. Clicking a card opens the site in a new proxy iframe tab: TikTok (tiktok.com), YouTube (youtube.com), Wikipedia (wikipedia.org), Disney Plus (disneyplus.com), ChatGPT (chat.openai.com), Google Gemini (gemini.google.com). Use brand-representative accent colors for each card.

quotes: A beautiful grid of quick-access cards
Each card has a large icon, site name, brief description, and opens the site in a proxy iframe tab when clicked

acceptanceCriteria: All 6 quick-open cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has a large icon, site name, and brief description
Each card uses a brand-relevant accent color
Clicking any card opens the site URL in a new proxy iframe tab

requirements.text: Implement global UX polish: smooth CSS transitions and animations on all page/tab switches and interactive elements; a loading overlay/spinner when iframes are loading; responsive layout that works across desktop and tablet widths; consistent neon glow hover states throughout; and localStorage used to persist open tabs state and settings across sessions.

quotes: Smooth animations and transitions throughout
Loading spinner/animation when pages are loading in iframe
Responsive design
LocalStorage for saving settings

acceptanceCriteria: All page transitions use CSS animations
iframe loading states show a visible spinner
Layout is usable on screen widths from 768px upward
Tab and settings state is persisted in localStorage and restored on reload

constraints: All Motoko backend logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo — this app is primarily frontend-only; backend should expose minimal or no custom endpoints unless required.
The allorigins.win CORS proxy URL (https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=) must be used as the iframe proxy for external sites.
Google CSE ID 464f1cf85006c4770 must be used exactly as provided.
Puter.js must be loaded via its CDN script tag and accessed via window.puter.ai.chat.
CodeMirror must be loaded via CDN.
Do not open proxied sites in new browser tabs — all external content must open in iframe tabs within the app.
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, ui components, main.tsx) must not be modified.
nonGoals: No Rust, Python, or non-Motoko backend code.
No real authentication or Internet Identity integration for this app.
No external database or cloud storage — localStorage only for persistence.

required: Stylized cheetah head icon in amethyst/purple neon glow style on a transparent background (cheetah-logo.dim_128x128.png)
